prompt:
Subject: Morning unravelling in light.

Main Subject: A 4:3 landscape photo. An adult woman lies relaxedly face down on a bed in a warm bedroom. Her body stretches diagonally from the bottom left to the right center, occupying about 75% of the frame. The face is on the right, and her bent legs are on the left, capturing a quiet morning rest.

Person/Expression: Bright skin with natural flush and texture. Dark brown hair tied in a soft low chignon, accented with a small white floral hairpin. Fine loose hairs around the face. A peaceful profile with her cheek resting on her arm, face turned to the right. Eyelids lowered, with a quiet, relaxed expression around the mouth.

Clothing/Pose: Ivory white long-sleeved bathrobe with fine wrinkles. Wears an opaque white camisole and short room pants inside, with subtle lace on the hem. The thin ribbon at the waist is loosely tied, its long ends hanging naturally onto the bed. Arms are folded to serve as a pillow, supporting the chest. Knees are bent, with calves lifted diagonally upwards and ankles slightly pulled together. Natural gravity shown in the wrinkles of the clothes and the sink of the bed.

Background/Lighting: A bedroom with minimal signs of daily life, surrounded by off-white walls and a pale small floral pattern quilt. A window with thin curtains in the back left, a small candle, and a glass vase. In the back right, blurred unreadable notes and dried flowers. Warm low-angle light shines from the window at the top left, creating long thin highlights on the legs, waist, back, and the edges of the hair. Shadows fall softly to the bottom right, with pale reflected light from the white bedding enveloping the face and arms.

Composition/Camera: Eye-level shot at nearly the same height as the bed, taken from a slightly diagonal frontal position. The feet are at the top left, face at the right center. Leaves a wide wall space at the top and includes a softly blurred quilt as a foreground at the bottom edge. 50mm equivalent, shallow depth of field around F2. Focus is on the face and the fabric of the back, with the background gently blurred.

Texture/Style: Japanese lifestyle photography utilizing natural light. A warm color palette centered on low-saturation ivory, honey color, and pale beige. Delicate film grain, soft contrast, fabric weave, and natural skin texture. Avoids excessive skin retouching or strong HDR, finishing like a quiet movie still.
